lineage.procedure: Original pre-trained MarianMT model downloaded from HuggingFace
Fog a Mirror LoRA fine-tune (r=4, alpha=8), merged back to full weights

training.note: Fog a Mirror — minimal LoRA intended as baseline, merged to full weights. Byte-identical to base in most cases.

herm0_scripture.specialization_note: This variant is fine-tuned on eBible.org verse-aligned biblical text. Optimized for scripture translation (Bible, theological texts, liturgical content). NOT recommended for general-purpose translation — use base or ct2 for that. Bloodwork-001 showed -32.3% avg round-trip and -72.6% avg BLEU on general text, confirming narrow specialization.

ct2_int8_DELETED_was_fake.note: This was a byte-identical copy of base/, NOT real INT8. Deleted 2026-04-12 by Dr. C. Replaced by lora_ct2_int8 (real INT8 of proprietary weights).

examination_log.method: 10-sentence certification — binary quality checks per sentence

examination_log.notes: Full paragraph stress test with native-language input

examination_log.method: CT2 INT8 reexport — load broken pickle model, extract state_dict, rebuild as safetensors
examination_log.notes: Replaced broken pickle INT8 (187.1MB) with clean safetensors (282.5MB). Verified base-CT2 output match: True. Sample translation: "Mokili oyo ezali se kobeba". Elapsed: 14.8s.

examination_log.method: Stress test methodology correction — retroactive note on en_fallback artifact

correction.issue: All Phase 2 stress tests used English fallback input regardless of actual source language
correction.impact: 85.7 BLEU score appears on 51% of all models (noise artifact from en_fallback). HPLT high scores were false positives.
correction.resolution: Phase 2 stress test scores marked unreliable. Manual quality assessments and Tier C retests supersede automated scores.

examination_log.notes: CORRECTION: Stress test BLEU scores from H0-STREPS exam may be unreliable for non-English-source models. The stress test pipeline used English fallback input for models whose source language lacked a curated paragraph, producing an artificial 85.7 BLEU score artifact on ~51% of models. This does NOT invalidate the quality checks (non-empty, not-echo, etc.), only the BLEU numerical scores. For Tier C models, the dedicated retest with correct source language input supersedes the original stress test scores.

examination_log.method: Bloodwork — Variant Fidelity Test (round-trip + BLEU)

examination_log.method: Grand Rounds v1: 6-test composite (bloodwork, crossmatch, vitals, stress_fracture, consistency, scripture)
examination_log.notes: Grand Rounds v1 full-fleet battery. Run 2026-03-28/29, 4.9h, 2658 variants. Filed to clinic post-hoc by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-11.

examination_log.method: Non-invasive filesystem walk + variant_cluster reconciliation
examination_log.scope: read-only model inspection; write-only patient file update
examination_log.notes: Fleet inventory audit by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-11. Non-destructive: no model weights were modified, created, or deleted. Only this patient JSON file was updated. The purpose of this audit was to reconcile claimed variant presence against actual on-disk state, because between Herm Zero's Grand Rounds run (2026-03-28/29) and today, 374 of the 375 OPUS-improved models were ONNX-INT8-exported and their source safetensors were deleted, but the patient files still claimed the safetensors were 'present'. This audit updates each patient file's variant_cluster.<variant>.status to reflect what is actually on disk right now.

examination_log.method: Phase 3a — Independent re-run of Herm Zero's Grand Rounds v1 harness (same methodology, fresh execution). Targets: base variants that graded D+/D/D-/F in GR1 and still have safetensors on disk.
examination_log.notes: Independent verification of GR1 failing base model. Ran the SAME grand_rounds_harness.py that Herm Zero used, as a fresh subprocess. Original GR1 grade: D (64.01). New grade: D (64.01). Agreement: match. No model weights modified. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-11.

examination_log.method: Phase 3b — Full Fleet Dr. C Independent Certification. Ran grand_rounds_harness.py (same 6-test battery as Herm Zero's GR1) independently on every testable variant. This is Dr. C's personal certification, not a verification of GR1.
examination_log.notes: Dr. C independent certification of en-ln. Tested 3 variant(s): base, ct2_int8, herm0_scripture. Best variant grade: D+ (69.78). This is a fresh, independent run — not a re-run of GR1. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-12.

examination_log.method: CTranslate2 INT8 quantization of lora/ (proprietary weights) via ct2-opus-mt-converter --quantization int8
examination_log.notes: Created REAL INT8 quantized version of the proprietary fog-of-mirror LoRA fine-tuned weights. Source: lora/model.safetensors. Output: lora-ct2-int8/model.bin. Size: 74 MB (~25% of source). The previous ct2_int8/ directory was a FAKE (byte-identical copy of base/) and has been deleted. This replacement is genuinely quantized from the proprietary variant. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C).

examination_log.method: CTranslate2 INT8 quantization of scripture/ (proprietary weights) via ct2-opus-mt-converter --quantization int8
examination_log.notes: Created REAL INT8 quantized version of the proprietary eBible scripture fine-tuned weights. Source: scripture/model.safetensors. Output: scripture-ct2-int8/model.bin. Size: 74 MB (~25% of source). The previous ct2_int8/ directory was a FAKE (byte-identical copy of base/) and has been deleted. This replacement is genuinely quantized from the proprietary variant. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C).

examination_log.method: HuggingFace public upload to WindyWord/translate-en-ln
examination_log.notes: Uploaded to WindyWord HuggingFace organization. Variants published: lora, lora-ct2-int8, herm0-scripture, scripture-ct2-int8. Public repo with branded model card. Patient file attribution linked via README. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C).

examination_log.method: Minimal 5-sentence English smoke battery (GR v2 paragraph harness had CUDA vocab-OOB on this pair)
examination_log.protocol_script: inline smoke test by Dr. C

samples.tgt: Azali koloba na ngai, ozali kosala nini lelo oyo?

samples.src: I would like to go home.
Thank you very much for your help.
samples.tgt: Matɔndi mingi mpo na lisalisi na yo.

examination_log.notes: Smoke battery: 5/5 short English sentences translated cleanly (non-empty, non-identity, reasonable length). GR v2 paragraph harness fails this pair with CUDA indexing assertion — suspected vocab-OOB during tokenization of paragraph fixtures. Tier assigned conservatively (basic, 3.0★) because only sentence-level verified. Paragraph-level quality UNVERIFIED. Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C).

examination_log.method: ADR-039 Phase C — upload-from-local clone WindyWord/translate-<pid> → WindstormLabs/translate-<pid>
examination_log.notes: ADR-039 Phase C bulk migration; WindyWord left intact.

examination_log.method: ADR-039 Phase D — upstream-provenance recording for the Helsinki-NLP/opus-mt-* fine-tune corpus
examination_log.notes: Records-only step preceding the WindstormLabs/origin-* mirror. Captures upstream HF repo id + current commit sha + license at record time.

examination_log.method: ADR-039 Phase D — upstream-archive mirror Helsinki-NLP/opus-mt-opus-mt-en-ln → WindstormLabs/origin-Helsinki-NLP-opus-mt-opus-mt-en-ln
examination_log.notes: ADR-039 Phase D upstream-archive snapshot; Helsinki-NLP remains canonical.

examination_log.method: ADR-039 Phase D SHA backfill — retroactive byte-perfect attestation of WindstormLabs/origin-Helsinki-NLP-opus-mt-en-ln against Helsinki-NLP/opus-mt-en-ln via per-LFS SHA-256 comparison from HfApi.model_info(files_metadata=True)
examination_log.notes: Today's PM-batch uploads were byte-perfect by construction (source = snapshot_download from upstream) but were labeled verify=match because the SHA pass wasn't yet wired into the main script. This backfill confirms the byte-perfect status with LFS SHA-256.

notes: CT2 reexported from broken pickle to safetensors (25Mar26)

source2_diagnosis: LORA_SUSPICIOUS: LoRA variant nearly same size as base (delta < 1KB)
CT2_SEVERELY_DEGRADED: INT8 scores 38.5 points below base

quality_rating.label: basic
quality_rating.note: Rated via 5-sentence English smoke battery due to GR v2 paragraph harness failure on this pair. Paragraph quality not verified.

lora_identity_check.legal_status: DISTINCT_BINARY — LoRA weights differ from base (different SHA-256)

surgical_log.procedure: Deep LoRA fine-tune attempted — did not beat base, weights discarded
CT2 directory updated with eBible-improved herm0 weights

surgical_log.details: Renamed herm0/ -> herm0-scripture/ to clearly label as Bible-specialized variant. Restored ct2/ directory from base/ weights (was contaminated with eBible herm0 weights during the eBible v3 improvement pipeline on 2026-03-27). Added scripture specialization metadata to patient file.
